title: Dense Bi-Encoder Retrieval and Domain Transfer · Code Recall
summary: A delayed retrieval review reconstructs dense bi-encoder retrieval and domain transfer from source, document, chunk, model, index, query, candidate, response, citation, evaluation, operations, and stakeholder evidence, then attacks one retained misconception. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for dense retrieval candidate service after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate offline document encoding from online query encoding while preserving one versioned bi-encoder space.
Apply model-specific query and document prompts, prefixes, normalization, and maximum-length behavior.
Tune candidate depth from recall and downstream reranking evidence rather than context-window size.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

steps.title: RAG and Python Separate evidence from confidence · Review Rag Embedding Migration
steps.instruction:
review case — A review RAG engineering team handles case 6103 during a regulated document deletion request. Build deterministic Python evidence to gate dense retrieval on one embedding space, candidate recall, domain, and language evidence; keep browser execution pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of model, vector-database, network, file, credential, and host effects; then remove one supporting source and require abstention instead of a plausible unsupported answer. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Plan dual encoding, reindexing, compatibility, canaries, cache invalidation, rollback, and old-vector deletion across model changes.

steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Rag Embedding Migration: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review RAG engineering team handles case 8436 during a multilingual support escalation. Build deterministic Python evidence to gate dense retrieval on one embedding space, candidate recall, domain, and language evidence; measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score; then remove one supporting source and require abstention instead of a plausible unsupported answer. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Plan dual encoding, reindexing, compatibility, canaries, cache invalidation, rollback, and old-vector deletion across model changes.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Embedding Migration.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Embedding Migration, keep Rag Embedding Migration connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Plan dual encoding, reindexing, compatibility, canaries, cache invalidation, rollback, and old-vector deletion across model changes.

hints: For RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Embedding Migration, name the stakeholder, corpus, source, document, chunk, model, index, query, relevance, tenant, context, citation, evaluation, and transfer boundary, Rag Embedding Migration precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Embedding Migration, trace this concrete input and predict ingestion, normalization, retrieval, filter, fusion, reranking, context, claim, citation, abstention, latency, cost, failure, and recovery evidence before reviewing it: A review RAG engineering team handles case 8436 during a multilingual support escalation. Build deterministic Python evidence to gate dense retrieval on one embedding space, candidate recall, domain, and language evidence; measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score; then remove one supporting source and require abstention instead of a plausible unsupported answer. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Plan dual encoding, reindexing, compatibility, canaries, cache invalidation, rollback, and old-vector deletion across model changes.

For RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Embedding Migration, challenge the documented misconception with changed-query, changed-corpus, relevance, retrieval, grounding, citation, adversarial, accessibility, failure, recovery, and controlled native or production-transfer evidence: An embedding model can be changed without rebuilding or versioning the index.
